rotor_imbalance.recommended_action: Inspect pulley, coupling, fan, and carried load symmetry; clean buildup; balance rotating element if evidence persists.
inspection_steps: Confirm 1x shaft-frequency vibration rises with speed.
Check coupling set screws, pulley runout, and product buildup.
Repeat baseline run after cleaning or balancing.
rotor_imbalance.verification: 1x vibration amplitude returns within 2.5 robust baseline units for two production cycles.

mechanical_looseness.recommended_action: Inspect motor mount, gearbox base, bearing housing, sensor bracket, and frame fasteners; torque and mark hardware.
inspection_steps: Check for high crest factor and broadband vibration.
Inspect mounting bolts and frame welds.
Verify accelerometer mounting integrity before declaring a machine fault.
mechanical_looseness.verification: Crest factor and broadband energy return to baseline after torque check.

belt_tension_drift.recommended_action: Check belt tension, tracking, roller drag, and product accumulation; adjust tension and verify current draw.
inspection_steps: Compare current trend at similar load and speed.
Inspect belt tracking marks and roller bearings.
Re-run loaded and unloaded current checks.
belt_tension_drift.verification: Load-normalized current returns to baseline and no new temperature rise appears.

overheating.recommended_action: Check ventilation, duty cycle, current draw, ambient temperature, drive thermal limits, and mechanical friction.
inspection_steps: Confirm temperature slope remains positive after speed/load normalization.
Inspect cooling path and motor fan.
overheating.verification: Temperature stabilizes below warning threshold under representative load.

sensor_or_mounting_issue.recommended_action: Validate sensor mounting, cable shielding, connector strain relief, and acquisition grounding before opening a mechanical work order.
inspection_steps: Check whether vibration anomaly appears without current or temperature correlation.
Tap-test sensor mounting and compare with reference sensor.
Inspect cable routing near VFD or servo power leads.
sensor_or_mounting_issue.verification: Signal noise floor and crest factor return to baseline after sensor remediation.

healthy.recommended_action: Continue normal operation and retain data for baseline improvement.
healthy.verification: Routine trend review at the next maintenance interval.
